nasb.text: When He had come back to Capernaum several days afterward, it was heard that He was at home.

esv.text: And when he returned to Capernaum after some days, it was reported that he was at home.

cnv.text: 過了些日子，耶穌再回到迦百農。一聽說他在屋子裡，

ccb.text: 几天后，耶稣回到迦百农。祂在家的消息一传开，

csbs.text: 过了些日子，耶稣又进了迦百农。人们听说他在房子里，
